title: Blox AI POST /execute-action request body
description: Phase 10 contract. The phone app submits this body via the BLE proxy when the user taps Approve on a `recommended_action` event. Container validates: action_id matches a known recommended_action, approval_token verifies + isn't expired + isn't replayed, security_code matches /etc/fula/blox-ai/security-code (only required for tier-3 actions per action_whitelist.json).

action_id.description: Matches the action_id from the `recommended_action` SSE event the user approved.

approval_token.description: Opaque token issued by the container with the recommended_action event. Shape: base64url(json({action_id, expires_at, nonce, hmac})). Container verifies HMAC + expires_at + nonce uniqueness (in-memory LRU per container restart). Schema treats as opaque + bounded.

security_code.description: Required for tier-3 destructive actions. Container compares against contents of /etc/fula/blox-ai/security-code (root-only file, default '1234' shipped by fula.sh). User can edit the file to set a per-device code. If file is missing/empty, tier-3 actions are REJECTED.
